subcodes.first_line: O Thou through Whose most sweet call the spirits of the pure ones were entranced, and through Whose spiritual melodies of divine creation the hearts were enraptured [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من بندآئک الاحلی انجذبت ارواح الاصفیاء و من تغنیات بدعک الروحی تولهت افئده
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @knowledge; recognition of God, @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
